name: Linguine Tuna Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw peas before using in this salad.
2. Cook linguine according to package directions, then drain.
3. In a large bowl, combine lemon juice, vegetable oil, onions, sugar, Italian seasoning, and salt. Mix well.
4. Add hot linguine; toss.
5. Add remaining ingredients; mix well.
6. Cover and chill to blend flavors.
7. Serve on lettuce leaves and garnish as desired.
8. Refrigerate leftovers.
